query: /data-wizard experiment Design an A/B test to measure whether our new checkout flow increases conversion rate
expected_behavior: Agent routes to Experiment Design mode based on 'experiment' keyword
Agent classifies as Standard tier (A/B test design)
Agent reads references/experiment-design.md for A/B test patterns
Agent runs statistical-test-selector.py to determine appropriate test (two-proportion z-test or Chi-Square)
Agent performs power analysis to calculate required sample size per group
Agent specifies significance level (alpha) and desired statistical power (1 - beta)
Agent recommends test duration based on expected traffic and required sample size
Agent addresses potential confounds: novelty effects, multiple comparisons, seasonal variation
Agent mentions CUPED variance reduction as an option to reduce required sample size
Agent outputs a complete experiment brief with hypothesis, metrics, and decision criteria
